CREATE TABLE dim_supplier (
  surrogate_key INT PRIMARY KEY,
  business_key VARCHAR(100),
  effective_date DATE,
  expiry_date DATE,
  is_current BOOLEAN,
  hash_diff VARCHAR(64)
);

CREATE TABLE dim_product (
  surrogate_key INT PRIMARY KEY,
  business_key VARCHAR(100),
  effective_date DATE,
  expiry_date DATE,
  is_current BOOLEAN,
  hash_diff VARCHAR(64)
);

CREATE TABLE dim_warehouse (
  surrogate_key INT PRIMARY KEY,
  business_key VARCHAR(100),
  effective_date DATE,
  expiry_date DATE,
  is_current BOOLEAN,
  hash_diff VARCHAR(64)
);

CREATE TABLE dim_carrier (
  surrogate_key INT PRIMARY KEY,
  business_key VARCHAR(100),
  effective_date DATE,
  expiry_date DATE,
  is_current BOOLEAN,
  hash_diff VARCHAR(64)
);

CREATE TABLE fact_shipment (
  surrogate_key INT PRIMARY KEY,
  business_key VARCHAR(100),
  effective_date DATE,
  expiry_date DATE,
  is_current BOOLEAN,
  hash_diff VARCHAR(64),
  dim_supplier_key INT REFERENCES dim_supplier(surrogate_key),
  dim_product_key INT REFERENCES dim_product(surrogate_key),
  dim_warehouse_key INT REFERENCES dim_warehouse(surrogate_key),
  dim_carrier_key INT REFERENCES dim_carrier(surrogate_key)
);

CREATE TABLE fact_purchase_order (
  surrogate_key INT PRIMARY KEY,
  business_key VARCHAR(100),
  effective_date DATE,
  expiry_date DATE,
  is_current BOOLEAN,
  hash_diff VARCHAR(64),
  dim_supplier_key INT REFERENCES dim_supplier(surrogate_key),
  dim_product_key INT REFERENCES dim_product(surrogate_key),
  dim_warehouse_key INT REFERENCES dim_warehouse(surrogate_key),
  dim_carrier_key INT REFERENCES dim_carrier(surrogate_key)
);
